raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.3,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":0.7,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.6":"The delegation 'Clean this up' most directly requests sentence- and paragraph-level refinement of the draft's grammar, flow, register, and concision.","RX.1":"The artifact contains empirical and causal claims that should preserve appropriate uncertainty when cleaned up.","RX.2":"The cleanup should avoid strengthening claims about HTE quality, scaling laws, or deployment beyond what the reported results support.","RX.3":"The task should remain confined to cleanup rather than executing a deeper review, redesign, or scholarship audit.","RX.4":"Because the draft references clinical and policy domains, cleanup should avoid wording that could encourage unsupported downstream reliance.","RX.5":"Any cleanup responsibility must preserve traceability to the artifact's stated methods, datasets, metrics, and numerical results."}}

rationale.R1.6: The delegation 'Clean this up' most directly requests sentence- and paragraph-level refinement of the draft's grammar, flow, register, and concision.
rationale.RX.1: The artifact contains empirical and causal claims that should preserve appropriate uncertainty when cleaned up.
rationale.RX.2: The cleanup should avoid strengthening claims about HTE quality, scaling laws, or deployment beyond what the reported results support.
rationale.RX.3: The task should remain confined to cleanup rather than executing a deeper review, redesign, or scholarship audit.
rationale.RX.4: Because the draft references clinical and policy domains, cleanup should avoid wording that could encourage unsupported downstream reliance.
rationale.RX.5: Any cleanup responsibility must preserve traceability to the artifact's stated methods, datasets, metrics, and numerical results.
